expo.name: Pattypan
expo.description: Pattypan is a mobile-first garden companion for weather-aware plant care, photo memory, diagnosis, and garden planning.

plugins.photosPermission: Pattypan uses your photos to help identify plants and save growth observations.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pattypan uses the camera so you can scan plants, pests, weeds, and garden changes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Pattypan uses your location to personalize weather, frost, heat, wind, and garden alerts.
